{
  "analysis": "All requirements have been verified and confirmed working:

1. **Windows 3.11 Desktop**: Running at 1024x768 graphics mode with proper Program Manager colors (gray desktop, white/dark gray panels, blue title bars, black text)
2. **VNC Display :1**: QEMU listening on port 5901
3. **nginx Web Interface**: Port 80 proxies through to websockify:6080 which bridges to VNC:5901 - HTTP 200 confirmed
4. **Snapshot Mode**: qcow2 overlay active, original /app/isos/win311.img remains immutable
5. **Monitor Socket**: /tmp/qemu-monitor.sock exists and accepts programmatic keyboard input via sendkey commands
6. **Background**: All services (QEMU PID 3650, nginx PIDs 4112/4113, websockify PID 1223) running in background

All checks passed. Ready to submit.",
  "plan": "Task is complete. All objectives achieved and verified.",
  "commands": [],
  "task_complete": true
}
